title: Premium Stainless Steel Egg Slicer – 2-in-1 Egg Cutter & Wedger with Heavy Duty 304 Wires & Zinc Alloy Frame – Professional Slicer for Hard Boiled Eggs,Mozzarella,Mushrooms,Soft Fruits,Dishwasher Safe
features: ✅ PRECISION CUTTING WITH A PROFILE SOLUTION: Our stainless steel egg slicer effortlessly transforms boiled eggs into perfectly even slices or wedges – ideal for salads, canapés, or garnishes. The ultra-sharp 304 stainless steel wires guarantee clean cuts without crushing, giving every dish a professional look!

✅ VERSATILE KITCHEN HELPER FOR ALL SOFT INGREDIENTS: Not just eggs! Slice mozzarella, mushrooms, strawberries, avocados, or even soft potatoes with the same precision tool. Perfect for meal prep, party snacks, or kids' meals – save time and achieve restaurant-quality results!

✅ HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS – EXTREMELY DURABLE: The sturdy zinc alloy frame and rust-proof stainless steel wires make this slicer a long-lasting companion. No bending, no rust – just years of reliability, even with daily use!

✅ SAFE & EASY TO USE – READY IN SECONDS: No fiddling with knives! Simply place the ingredient, press the lid – and you're done. Especially safe for children or inexperienced cooks and ideal for quick snacks on the go.

✅ HYGIENIC & DISHWASHER SAFE – CLEAN IN SECONDS: The smooth stainless steel allows food residue to slide off easily. Dishwasher safe for hassle-free cleanup – or simply rinse under water. Perfect for busy kitchens and hygiene fans!
description: Specifications ✔ Material: Cutting wires: High-quality 304 stainless steel Frame: Robust zinc alloy ✔ Dimensions: Total size: approx. 15 x 10 x 5 cm (compact & space-saving) Cutting surface: Ø 6 cm (fits XL eggs & small mozzarella balls) ✔ Weight: 180 g (sturdy, but light enough for easy handling) ✔ Color: Stainless steel look (silver) – timeless & Modern ✔ Special features: 2-in-1 function: slices or wedges Dishwasher safe (pot rack recommended) 🍳 Areas of use (What is the egg slicer ideal for?) ✔ Perfect for eggs: Boiled eggs into even slices (for salads, sandwiches) Wedge cut for soups, egg salad, or buffet decoration ✔ Multifunctional for soft foods: Cheese: mozzarella, feta, soft tofu Fruit: strawberries, kiwis, bananas, avocados Vegetables: mushrooms, boiled potatoes, zucchini slices Bonus: Ideal for baby food (equal portions) ⚠️ Important Notes 🔹 Before first use: Clean the egg slicer with warm water and dish soap. 🔹 Cutting technique: Press the lid evenly (not at an angle) to ensure perfect cuts.
